ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the company was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insiders" (
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider */,
  "insider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insider */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the insider belongs to */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Insider's relationship with the company */,
  "title" TEXT /* Insider's title within the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Insider's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Insider's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insiders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "reported_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was reported */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company involved in the transaction */,
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insider who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "shares_traded" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price per share */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "shares_owned" TEXT /* Number of shares owned by the insider after the transaction */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of filing */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded in the transaction */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag to mark suspicious or significant transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_insider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insider_id") REFERENCES insiders ("insider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_filing_type FOREIGN KEY ("filing_type") REFERENCES filing_types ("filing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_types" (
  "filing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing type */,
  "filing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the filing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
